faqs.question: Are hornets common in the Navy Yard Area of Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are frequently found in Navy Yard due to the area's mix of older industrial buildings with accessible eaves, waterfront location attracting insects, and green spaces around converted warehouses.
